queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the relationship between the absence of a checking account and credit default probability, focusing on its role as a determinant of reduced credit risk.
Statistical impact of loan duration in months on credit default probability, examining how specific tenor lengths function as credit risk drivers associated with decreased default likelihood.

queries.question: Determinants of default related to a checking account balance below zero, analyzing the empirical evidence regarding its contribution to mitigating credit risk.
